easy.title: Check Active Venv
easy.description: Write function returning True if running inside a venv.
easy.solution:
import sys
def is_venv(): return sys.prefix != sys.base_prefix

medium.title: Parse Requirements File

hard.title: Generate Gitignore Checker
hard.solution:
def checks_gitignore(text):
    return any(line.strip().startswith('.venv') or line.strip() == 'venv' for line in text.splitlines())

debugging.title: Fix Gitignore Venv Entry
debugging.description: Fix missing venv entry in gitignore list.
bugs: Missing `.venv/` entry causes environment directory to be tracked by Git.
